purpose: Register and process accessible sources with provenance and evidence coordinates.
steps: Record source metadata and authority tier.
Calculate a hash when raw bytes are accessible.
Extract page, row, timestamp, archive member or commit coordinates.
Record parser version, failures, omissions and duplicates.
Keep raw evidence separate from summaries.
Record contradictions, supersession and open loops.
rollback: Remove derived index entries and preserve the audit record.
supersession: link later versions and retain history
